[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 01101010 4
3 11000001 3
4 01000000 1
5 11101011 6
6 11110001 5
7 01001100 3

01 11101111 7
12 11110011 6
23 11101110 6
34 01011001 4
45 11101111 7
56 01111110 6
67 11111101 7
70 01010111 5

02 11111011 7
13 11110111 7
24 01011100 4
35 11011001 5
46 11111111 a
57 11111110 7
60 11011101 6
71 01001111 5

03 11101111 7
14 11110001 5 match 6
25 11001101 5
36 01111011 6
47 11111111 a
50 01111110 6
61 11001111 6
72 11110011 6

04 11111011 7
15 11110001 5 match 6
26 01111110 6
37 11111101 7
40 11111111 a
51 01111110 6
62 11111111 a
73 11100111 6

05 11101011 6 match 5
16 11110011 6
27 11111100 6
30 01011101 5
41 11101111 7
52 11111111 a
63 11101111 7
74 01010011 4

06 11111011 7
17 11111101 7

75 11000011 4

07 11111111 a

21 01001110 4
32 11111011 7

54 01111110 6
